title: Fix: Search for the latest AI news and summar
goal: Command 'Search for the latest AI news and summarize the top 3 stories, then draft a slack message I can share with my team' failed with: The task fully failed with an error 'content is required' and the summary contains only the error message instead of any useful output.. Suggestion: Debug the crawler or ai_process tool to ensure fetched content is properly passed downstream; add validation to surface a user-friendly fallback message if content retrieval fails.

test_requirements.case: route and execute 'Search for the latest AI news ...'

test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
